label: Morning Adhkar (أذكار الصباح)
desc: Remembrances to be recited after Fajr prayer until sunrise

entries.title: Surah Al-Fatiha
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ ﴿١﴾ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ ﴿٢﴾ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ ﴿٣﴾ مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ ﴿٤﴾ إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ ﴿٥﴾ اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ ﴿٦﴾ صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ ﴿٧﴾
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahir-Rahmaanir-Raheem. Al-hamdu lillaahi Rabbil-'aalameen. Ar-Rahmaanir-Raheem. Maaliki Yawmid-Deen. Iyyaaka na'budu wa iyyaaka nasta'een. Ihdinas-Siraatal-Mustaqeem. Siraatal-ladhina an'amta 'alayhim, ghayril-maghdoobi 'alayhim wa lad-daalleen.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all the worlds. The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Master of the Day of Judgment. You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help. Guide us on the Straight Path — the path of those You have blessed, not of those who have earned anger, nor of those who have gone astray.
entries.count_notes: Recite once
entries.benefit: The greatest surah of the Quran; a healing, a protection, and a dua all in one

entries.title: Ayat Al-Kursi
entries.ar: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahu laa ilaaha illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom. Laa ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa laa nawm. Lahoo maa fis-samaawaati wa maa fil-ard. Man dhal-ladhee yashfa'u 'indahoo illaa bi-idhnih. Ya'lamu maa bayna aydeehim wa maa khalfahum. Wa laa yuheetoona bi-shay'im-min 'ilmihee illaa bimaa shaa'. Wasi'a Kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal-ard. Wa laa ya'ooduhoo hifzuhumaa wa Huwal-'Aliyyul-'Azeem.
entries.tr: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who could intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
entries.count_notes: Recite once after every obligatory prayer and once in the morning
entries.benefit: Whoever recites it after every obligatory prayer, nothing but death will prevent him from entering Paradise. (An-Nasa'i, Ibn Hibban — Sahih al-Jami' 6464)

entries.title: Last Two Verses of Surah Al-Baqarah
entries.ar: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِن رَّبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۚ كُلٌّ آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ لَا نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍ مِّن رُّسُلِهِ ۚ وَقَالُوا سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا ۖ غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ ﴿٢٨٥﴾ لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا اكْتَسَبَتْ ۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ ۖ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ ﴿٢٨٦﴾
entries.tr_en: Aamanar-Rasoolu bimaa unzila ilayhi mir-Rabbihee wal-mu'minoon. Kullun aamana billaahi wa malaa'ikatihee wa kutubihee wa rusulih. Laa nufarriqu bayna ahadim-mir-rusulih. Wa qaaloo sami'naa wa ata'naa ghufraanaka Rabbanaa wa ilaykal-maseer. Laa yukallifullaahu nafsan illaa wus'ahaa. Lahaa maa kasabat wa 'alayhaa mak-tasabat. Rabbanaa laa tu'aakhidhnaa in-naseenaa aw akhta'naa. Rabbanaa wa laa tahmil 'alaynaa isran kamaa hamaltahoo 'alalladheena min qablinaa. Rabbanaa wa laa tuhammilnaa maa laa taaqata lanaa bih. Wa'fu 'annaa, waghfir lanaa, warhamnaa. Anta mawlaanaa fansurnaa 'alal-qawmil-kaafireen.
entries.tr: The Messenger has believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord, and so have the believers. All of them have believed in Allah and His angels and His books and His messengers, saying, 'We make no distinction between any of His messengers.' And they say, 'We hear and we obey. Grant us Your forgiveness, our Lord, and to You is the final destination.' Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear. It will have what it has earned, and it will bear what it has earned. 'Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we forget or make an error. Our Lord, lay not upon us a burden like that which You laid upon those before us. Our Lord, burden us not with that which we have no ability to bear. Pardon us, forgive us, and have mercy upon us. You are our protector, so give us victory over the disbelieving people.'
entries.count_notes: Recite once before sleeping / in morning
entries.benefit: Whoever recites these two verses at night will be sufficed by them (protected). They are a treasure from beneath the Throne of Allah. Reciting them before sleep protects from Shaytan for three nights.

entries.title: Sayyid Al-Istighfar (Master of Seeking Forgiveness)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma anta Rabbee laa ilaaha illaa anta, khalaqtanee wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'alaa 'ahdika wa wa'dika mas-tata'tu, a'oodhu bika min sharri maa sana'tu, aboo'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa aboo'u bidhambee, faghfir lee fa-innahoo laa yaghfirudh-dhunooba illaa ant.
entries.tr: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no deity worthy of worship except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I am upon Your covenant and promise to the best of my ability. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your blessing upon me and I acknowledge my sins, so forgive me, for indeed none forgives sins except You.
entries.count_notes: Once in the morning and once in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever says this with conviction in the morning and dies that day will enter Paradise. Whoever says it in the evening with conviction and dies that night will enter Paradise.

entries.title: Morning Declaration of Faith
entries.ar: أَصْبَحْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَعَلَى كَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَعَلَى دِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ، وَعَلَى مِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ، حَنِيفَاً مُسْلِمَاً وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
entries.tr_en: Asbah'naa 'alaa fitratil-Islaam, wa 'alaa kalimatil-ikhlaas, wa 'alaa deeni Nabiyyinaa Muhammadin sallallaahu 'alayhi wa sallam, wa 'alaa millati abeenaa Ibraaheem, haneefam-muslimaw-wa maa kaana minal-mushrikeen.
entries.tr: We have entered the morning upon the natural religion of Islam, upon the word of sincerity (La ilaha illallah), upon the religion of our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him), and upon the way of our father Ibrahim, a Hanif (pure monotheist) and a Muslim, and he was not of the polytheists.
entries.count_notes: Once in the morning; say 'Amsaynaa' instead of 'Asbah'naa' in the evening
entries.benefit: Affirms one's Islam and monotheism at the beginning of each day

entries.title: Morning Tawakkul and Refuge
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma bika asbahnaa wa bika amsaynaa wa bika nahyaa wa bika namootu wa ilaykan-nushoor.
entries.tr: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the resurrection.
entries.count_notes: Once in the morning; say 'wa ilaykalmaSeer' instead of 'nushoor' in the evening
entries.benefit: Expresses total dependence upon Allah at the start and end of each day

entries.title: Morning Witness (4 Times)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee asbahtu ushhiduka wa ushhidu hamalata 'arshika wa malaa'ikataka wa jamee'a khalqika annaka antAllaahu laa ilaaha illaa anta wahdaka laa shareeka lak, wa anna Muhammadan 'abduka wa rasooluk.
entries.tr: O Allah, I have entered the morning and call upon You and upon the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all of Your creation to bear witness that You are Allah, there is no deity worthy of worship except You alone, with no partner, and that Muhammad is Your slave and Your Messenger.
entries.count_notes: Four times in the morning; say 'amsaytu' in the evening
entries.benefit: Allah will spare whoever says this four times in the morning or evening from the Fire of Hell.

entries.title: Morning Gratitude for Blessings
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma maa asbaha bee min ni'matin aw bi-ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka laa shareeka lak, falakal-hamdu wa lakash-shukr.
entries.tr: O Allah, whatever blessing I or any of Your creation has received this morning is from You alone. You have no partner. To You belong all praise and all thanks.
entries.count_notes: Once in the morning; say 'amsaa' instead of 'asbaha' in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever says this in the morning has completed his obligation of gratitude for that day; and whoever says it in the evening has completed his obligation for that night.

entries.title: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, An-Nas (Morning)
entries.ar: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ﴿١﴾ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ﴿٢﴾ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ﴿٣﴾ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ ﴿٤﴾ | قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ﴿١﴾ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ﴿٢﴾ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ﴿٣﴾ وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ﴿٤﴾ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ ﴿٥﴾ | قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ﴿١﴾ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ﴿٢﴾ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ﴿٣﴾ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ﴿٤﴾ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ﴿٥﴾ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ ﴿٦﴾
entries.tr_en: Qul Huwallaahu Ahad. Allaahus-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yoolad. Wa lam yakul-lahoo kufuwan ahad. | Qul a'oodhu biRabbil-falaq. Min sharri maa khalaq. Wa min sharri ghaasiqin idhaa waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffaathaati fil-'uqad. Wa min sharri haasidin idhaa hasad. | Qul a'oodhu biRabbin-naas. Malikin-naas. Ilaahin-naas. Min sharril-waswaasil-khannaas. Alladhee yuwaswisu fee sudoorin-naas. Minal-jinnati wan-naas.
entries.tr: Say: He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born. Nor is there to Him any equivalent. | Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of Daybreak from the evil of what He created, and from the evil of darkness when it settles, and from the evil of the blowers in knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies. | Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the whisperer who withdraws — who whispers evil into the breasts of mankind — from among jinn and mankind.
entries.count_notes: Three times each in the morning and evening; once after each of the other prayers
entries.benefit: They will suffice as protection against everything. Uqbah ibn Amir reported: The Prophet commanded him to recite them at the end of every prayer. (Ahmad, Abu Dawud — Sahih)

entries.title: Tasbih of Juwayriyah (Glorious Tasbih)
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ وَزِنَةَ عَرْشِهِ وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِهِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaahi wa bihamdihee 'adada khalqihee wa ridaa nafsihee wa zinata 'arshihee wa midaada kalimaatih.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him, by the number of His creation and His pleasure, and by the weight of His Throne, and the ink of His words.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the morning
entries.benefit: These three phrases would outweigh the entire morning's worship of Juwayriyah (ra). The Prophet (pbuh) said they were greater than what she had recited all morning long.

entries.title: Subhanallah wa Bihamdihi (100 Times)
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaahi wa bihamdih.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.
entries.count_notes: One hundred times in the morning and evening
entries.benefit: Whoever recites this one hundred times in the morning and in the evening will not be surpassed on the Day of Resurrection by anyone having done better than this except for someone who recited it more.

entries.title: Tahlil (100 Times)
entries.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illAllaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in qadeer.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.
entries.count_notes: One hundred times per day; or ten times after Fajr and Maghrib
entries.benefit: Equivalent to freeing ten slaves, 100 good deeds recorded, 100 sins erased, protection from Shaytan all day, and no one on that Day will do better except one who did more.

entries.title: Seeking Protection from Kufr, Poverty and Grave Punishment
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma 'aafinee fee badanee, Allaahumma 'aafinee fee sam'ee, Allaahumma 'aafinee fee basaree, laa ilaaha illaa anta. Allaahumma innee a'oodhu bika minal-kufri wal-faqr, wa a'oodhu bika min 'adhaabil-qabr, laa ilaaha illaa ant.
entries.tr: O Allah, grant me health in my body. O Allah, grant me health in my hearing. O Allah, grant me health in my sight. None has the right to be worshipped except You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief and poverty, and I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave. None has the right to be worshipped except You.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the morning and evening
entries.benefit: Comprehensive protection for body, senses, faith, and provision

entries.title: Contentment with Allah, Islam, and Muhammad
entries.ar: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبَّاً وَبِالإِسْلَامِ دِيناً وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيَّاً
entries.tr_en: Radeetu billaahi Rabban, wa bil-Islaami deenan, wa bi-Muhammadin sallallaahu 'alayhi wa sallama nabiyyan.
entries.tr: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad (peace be upon him) as my Prophet.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the morning and evening
entries.benefit: It is incumbent upon Allah to please whoever says this. (Abu Dawud — Hasan)

entries.title: Protection from All Harm (Bismillah Protection)
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahil-ladhee laa yadurru ma'as-mihee shay'un fil-ardi wa laa fis-samaa'i wa Huwas-Samee'ul-'Aleem.
entries.tr: In the Name of Allah, with Whose Name nothing can cause harm on earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the morning and evening
entries.ref: Abu Dawud 4/323, Tirmidhi 5/465, Ibn Majah 2/332, Ahmad
entries.benefit: Whoever recites it three times in the morning will not be afflicted by any calamity before evening, and whoever recites it three times in the evening will not be overtaken by any calamity before morning.

entries.title: Seeking Allah's Wellbeing (Aafiyah)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَمِنْ خَلْفِي وَعَنْ يَمِينِي وَعَنْ شِمَالِي وَمِنْ فَوْقِي وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee as'alukal-'afwa wal-'aafiyata fid-dunyaa wal-aakhirah. Allaahumma innee as'alukal-'afwa wal-'aafiyata fee deenee wa dunyaaya wa ahlee wa maalee. Allaahummastур 'awraatee wa aamin raw'aatee. Allaahumma-hfadhnee min bayni yadayya wa min khalfee wa 'an yameenee wa 'an shimaalee wa min fawqee, wa a'oodhu bi'adhamatika an ughtaala min tahtee.
entries.tr: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this life and the Hereafter. O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in my religious and my worldly affairs and my family and my wealth. O Allah, conceal my faults and calm my fears. O Allah, protect me from before me and behind me, from my right and my left, and from above me, and I seek refuge in Your greatness from being swallowed up from beneath me.
entries.count_notes: Once in the morning and evening
entries.benefit: Ibn Umar narrated that the Prophet never abandoned these words in the morning or evening. Comprehensive protection for all aspects of life.

entries.title: Seeking Refuge from Four Things
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee a'oodhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayn, wa ghalabatir-rijaal.
entries.tr: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from incapacity and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being heavily in debt and from being overpowered by men.
entries.count_notes: Morning and evening
entries.benefit: Comprehensive protection from both internal weaknesses (worry, laziness, cowardice, miserliness) and external difficulties (debt, oppression)

entries.title: Salawat (Blessings upon the Prophet) — Morning
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma salli wa sallim 'alaa nabiyyinaa Muhammad.
entries.tr: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
entries.count_notes: Ten times in the morning and ten times in the evening
entries.ref: At-Tabarani — authenticated by Al-Albani in Sahih al-Targhib 1/273
entries.benefit: Whoever recites blessings upon the Prophet ten times in the morning and ten times in the evening will obtain his intercession on the Day of Resurrection.

label: Evening Adhkar (أذكار المساء)
desc: Remembrances to be recited between Asr and Maghrib

entries.title: Evening Declaration
entries.ar: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ رَبِّ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَخَيْرَ مَا بَعْدَهَا وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهَا رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَالْهَرَمِ وَسُوءِ الْكِبَرِ رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ فِي النَّارِ وَعَذَابٍ فِي الْقَبْرِ
entries.tr_en: Amsaynaa wa amsal-mulku lillaah, wal-hamdu lillaah, laa ilaaha illAllaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in qadeer. Rabbi as'aluka khayra maa fee haadihil-laylati wa khayra maa ba'dahaa, wa a'oodhu bika min sharri maa fee haadihil-laylati wa sharri maa ba'dahaa. Rabbi a'oodhu bika minal-kasali wal-haram, wa soo'il-kibar. Rabbi a'oodhu bika min 'adhabin fin-naari wa 'adhabin fil-qabr.
entries.tr: We have entered the evening and the entire kingdom belongs to Allah, and all praise is due to Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent. My Lord, I ask You for the good in this night and the good after it, and I seek refuge in You from the evil of this night and the evil after it. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from laziness and the misery of old age. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from a torment in the Fire and a torment in the grave.
entries.count_notes: Once in the evening; substitute 'Asbahnaa' for the morning version
entries.benefit: Comprehensive evening supplication covering gratitude, protection, and seeking goodness

entries.title: Seeking Refuge at Evening
entries.ar: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
entries.tr_en: A'oodhu bikalimaatil-laahit-taammaati min sharri maa khalaq.
entries.tr: I seek refuge in the complete words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever says this in the evening, no poison or snake will harm him that night. (Muslim 2709)

entries.title: Seeking Forgiveness in the Evening
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَمْسَيْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee amsaytu ushhiduka wa ushhidu hamalata 'arshika wa malaa'ikataka wa jamee'a khalqika annaka antAllaahu laa ilaaha illaa anta wahdaka laa shareeka lak, wa anna Muhammadan 'abduka wa rasooluk.
entries.tr: O Allah, I have entered the evening and call upon You and upon the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all Your creation, to bear witness that You are Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except You alone, without partner, and that Muhammad is Your slave and Your Messenger.
entries.count_notes: Four times in the evening
entries.benefit: Allah will spare whoever says this four times from the Fire of Hell.

entries.title: Sayyid Al-Istighfar (Evening)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma anta Rabbee laa ilaaha illaa anta, khalaqtanee wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'alaa 'ahdika wa wa'dika mas-tata'tu, a'oodhu bika min sharri maa sana'tu, aboo'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa aboo'u bidhambee, faghfir lee fa-innahoo laa yaghfirudh-dhunooba illaa ant.
entries.tr: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no deity worthy of worship except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I am upon Your covenant and promise to the best of my ability. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your blessing upon me and I acknowledge my sins, so forgive me, for indeed none forgives sins except You.
entries.count_notes: Once in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever says this with conviction in the evening and dies that night will enter Paradise.

entries.title: Evening Declaration of Faith
entries.ar: أَمْسَيْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَعَلَى كَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ وَعَلَى دِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَعَلَى مِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَنِيفَاً مُسْلِمَاً وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
entries.tr_en: Amsaynaa 'alaa fitratil-Islaam, wa 'alaa kalimatil-ikhlaas, wa 'alaa deeni Nabiyyinaa Muhammadin sallallaahu 'alayhi wa sallam, wa 'alaa millati abeenaa Ibraaheem, haneefam-muslimaw-wa maa kaana minal-mushrikeen.
entries.tr: We have entered the evening upon the natural religion of Islam, upon the word of sincerity, upon the religion of our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him), and upon the way of our father Ibrahim, a Hanif and a Muslim.
entries.count_notes: Once in the evening
entries.benefit: Affirms one's Islam and monotheism at the end of each day.

entries.title: Evening Tawakkul and Refuge
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma bika amsaynaa wa bika asbahnaa wa bika nahyaa wa bika namootu wa ilaykal-maseer.
entries.tr: O Allah, by You we enter the evening and by You we enter the morning, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the final return.
entries.count_notes: Once in the evening
entries.benefit: Expresses total dependence upon Allah at the end of each day.

entries.title: Evening Witness (4 Times)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَمْسَيْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ أَنَّكَك أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee amsaytu ushhiduka wa ushhidu hamalata 'arshika wa malaa'ikataka wa jamee'a khalqika annaka antAllaahu laa ilaaha illaa anta wahdaka laa shareeka lak, wa anna Muhammadan 'abduka wa rasooluk.
entries.tr: O Allah, I have entered the evening and call upon You and the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all Your creation to witness that You are Allah, none worthy of worship except You alone, with no partner, and that Muhammad is Your slave and Messenger.
entries.count_notes: Four times in the evening
entries.benefit: Allah will spare whoever says this four times in the evening from the Fire of Hell.

entries.title: Evening Gratitude for Blessings
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَمْسَى بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma maa amsaa bee min ni'matin aw bi-ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka laa shareeka lak, falakal-hamdu wa lakash-shukr.
entries.tr: O Allah, whatever blessing I or any of Your creation has received this evening is from You alone. You have no partner. To You belong all praise and all thanks.
entries.count_notes: Once in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever says this in the evening has completed his obligation of gratitude for that night.

entries.title: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, An-Nas (Evening)
entries.ar: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ | قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ | قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
entries.tr_en: Qul Huwallaahu Ahad | Qul a'oodhu biRabbil-falaq | Qul a'oodhu biRabbin-naas
entries.tr: Surah Al-Ikhlas | Surah Al-Falaq | Surah An-Nas — recite each three times
entries.count_notes: Three times each in the evening
entries.benefit: Protection against everything. The Prophet commanded reciting these three times every morning and evening.

entries.title: Tasbih of Juwayriyah (Evening)
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ وَزِنَةَ عَرْشِهِ وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِهِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaahi wa bihamdihee 'adada khalqihee wa ridaa nafsihee wa zinata 'arshihee wa midaada kalimaatih.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him, by the number of His creation and His pleasure, and by the weight of His Throne, and the ink of His words.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the evening
entries.benefit: These three phrases outweigh an entire evening's worship.

entries.title: Subhanallah wa Bihamdihi (100 Times — Evening)
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaahi wa bihamdih.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him.
entries.count_notes: One hundred times in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever recites this 100 times in the evening will not be surpassed except by someone who recited it more.

entries.title: Tahlil (10 Times — After Maghrib)
entries.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illAllaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in qadeer.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.
entries.count_notes: Ten times after Maghrib
entries.benefit: Allah will record 10 good deeds, forgive 10 sins, raise 10 levels, shield from Shaytan all night.

entries.title: Protection from Kufr and Poverty (Evening)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma 'aafinee fee badanee, Allaahumma 'aafinee fee sam'ee, Allaahumma 'aafinee fee basaree, laa ilaaha illaa anta. Allaahumma innee a'oodhu bika minal-kufri wal-faqr, wa a'oodhu bika min 'adhaabil-qabr, laa ilaaha illaa ant.
entries.tr: O Allah, grant me health in my body. O Allah, grant me health in my hearing. O Allah, grant me health in my sight. None has the right to be worshipped except You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief, poverty, and the punishment of the grave.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the evening
entries.benefit: Comprehensive protection for body, senses, faith, and provision at night.

entries.title: Contentment (Evening)
entries.ar: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبَّاً وَبِالإِسْلَامِ دِيناً وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيَّاً
entries.tr_en: Radeetu billaahi Rabban, wa bil-Islaami deenan, wa bi-Muhammadin sallallaahu 'alayhi wa sallama nabiyyan.
entries.tr: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad (peace be upon him) as my Prophet.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the evening
entries.benefit: It is incumbent upon Allah to please whoever says this in the evening.

entries.title: Bismillah Protection (Evening)
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahil-ladhee laa yadurru ma'as-mihee shay'un fil-ardi wa laa fis-samaa'i wa Huwas-Samee'ul-'Aleem.
entries.tr: In the Name of Allah, with Whose Name nothing can cause harm on earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever recites this three times in the evening will not be overtaken by any calamity before morning.

entries.title: Seeking Allah's Wellbeing (Evening)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee as'alukal-'afwa wal-'aafiyata fid-dunyaa wal-aakhirah.
entries.tr: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this life and the Hereafter.
entries.count_notes: Once in the evening
entries.benefit: The Prophet never abandoned these words in the evening. Comprehensive protection.

entries.title: Seeking Refuge from Worry and Debt (Evening)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee a'oodhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayn, wa ghalabatir-rijaal.
entries.tr: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from incapacity and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being in debt and from being overpowered.
entries.count_notes: Evening
entries.benefit: Comprehensive protection from internal weaknesses and external difficulties at night.

entries.title: Salawat upon the Prophet (10 Times — Evening)
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma salli wa sallim 'alaa nabiyyinaa Muhammad.
entries.tr: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
entries.count_notes: Ten times in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever recites blessings upon the Prophet ten times in the evening will obtain his intercession on the Day of Resurrection.

label: Adhkar After Prayer (أذكار بعد الصلاة)
desc: Remembrances to be recited after each of the five daily prayers

entries.title: Istighfar After Salah
entries.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
entries.tr_en: Astaghfirullaah.
entries.tr: I seek the forgiveness of Allah.
entries.count_notes: Three times immediately after Tasleem
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) would seek forgiveness three times after every prayer.

entries.title: Tasbih, Tahmid, Takbir After Salah
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ (×٣٣) الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (×٣٣) اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (×٣٣) لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaah (×33), Alhamdu lillaah (×33), Allaahu Akbar (×33). Laa ilaaha illAllaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in qadeer.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah (×33). All praise is to Allah (×33). Allah is the Greatest (×33). None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.
entries.count_notes: 33 times each, completed with the tahlil
entries.benefit: Abu Hurayrah (ra) narrated that reciting this after every prayer will have all sins forgiven even if they are as abundant as the foam of the sea.

entries.title: Allahumma Antas-Salam
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma antas-salaam, wa minkas-salaam, tabaarakta yaa dhal-jalaali wal-ikraam.
entries.tr: O Allah, You are the Flawless One and peace/safety comes from You. Blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor.
entries.count_notes: Once, immediately after Tasleem
entries.benefit: Reported by Thawban (ra): This was the first dhikr the Prophet (pbuh) said after finishing prayer.

entries.title: Laa Ilaaha Illallah After Salah (10 Times — Fajr/Maghrib)
entries.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illAllaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, yuhyee wa yumeetu wa huwa 'alaa kulli shay'in qadeer.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and all praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things Omnipotent.
entries.count_notes: Ten times after Fajr and Maghrib only
entries.benefit: Abu Dharr narrated that whoever says this 10 times after Fajr and Maghrib: Allah will record 10 good deeds, forgive 10 sins, raise 10 levels, it will be a shield from repulsive things, and guarded from Shaytan that day.

entries.title: Dua for Protection and Good End
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma a'innee 'alaa dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibaadatik.
entries.tr: O Allah, help me in remembering You, in being grateful to You, and in worshipping You in an excellent manner.
entries.count_notes: After every prayer, especially Fajr
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) instructed Mu'adh ibn Jabal (ra) to say this after every prayer. Never leave this supplication.

entries.title: Dua for Asking Good in This Life and Hereafter
entries.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
entries.tr_en: Rabbanaa aatinaa fid-dunyaa hasanatan wa fil-aakhirati hasanatan wa qinaa 'adhaaban-naar.
entries.tr: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
entries.count_notes: After prayer, especially highly recommended
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) would most frequently make this dua. It is the most comprehensive supplication — covering all good in both worlds.

entries.title: Ayat al-Kursi After Salah
entries.ar: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahu laa ilaaha illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom. Laa ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa laa nawm. Lahoo maa fis-samaawaati wa maa fil-ard. Man dhal-ladhee yashfa'u 'indahoo illaa bi-idhnih. Ya'lamu maa bayna aydeehim wa maa khalfahum. Wa laa yuheetoona bi-shay'im-min 'ilmihee illaa bimaa shaa'. Wasi'a Kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal-ard. Wa laa ya'ooduhoo hifzuhumaa wa Huwal-'Aliyyul-'Azeem.
entries.tr: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who could intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
entries.count_notes: Recite once after every obligatory prayer, once in the morning, and before sleeping
entries.benefit: Recite Ayat al-Kursi (MA002) after every obligatory prayer. Whoever recites it after every compulsory prayer, nothing prevents him from entering Paradise except death.

label: Adhkar Before Sleep (أذكار النوم)
desc: Remembrances to be recited before going to sleep

entries.title: Bismika Allahumma Amoot wa Ahya
entries.ar: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
entries.tr_en: Bismika Allaahumma amootu wa ahyaa.
entries.tr: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
entries.benefit: From the sleep adhkar of the Prophet (pbuh). Sleep is akin to death; waking is like resurrection.

entries.title: Tasbih Before Sleep (Fatimah's Tasbih)
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ (×٣٣) الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (×٣٣) اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (×٣٤)
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaah (×33), Alhamdu lillaah (×33), Allaahu Akbar (×34).
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah (×33), All praise is to Allah (×33), Allah is the Greatest (×34).
entries.count_notes: Total 100. Said before sleeping
entries.benefit: When Fatimah (ra) asked the Prophet for a servant due to exhaustion from housework, he instead taught her this tasbih. He said it is better for you than a servant. It will strengthen you and give you energy.

entries.title: Al-Kafirun Before Sleep
entries.ar: قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا الْكَافِرُونَ ﴿١﴾ لَا أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ ﴿٢﴾ وَلَا أَنتُمْ عَابِدُونَ مَا أَعْبُدُ ﴿٣﴾ وَلَا أَنَا عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ ﴿٤﴾ وَلَا أَنتُمْ عَابِدُونَ مَا أَعْبُدُ ﴿٥﴾ لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِيَ دِينِ ﴿٦﴾
entries.tr_en: Qul yaa ayyuhal-kaafirun. Laa a'budu maa ta'budoon. Wa laa antum 'aabidoona maa a'bud. Wa laa ana 'aabidun maa 'abadtum. Wa laa antum 'aabidoona maa a'bud. Lakum deenukum wa liya deen.
entries.tr: Say: O disbelievers, I do not worship what you worship. Nor are you worshippers of what I worship. Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship. Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship. For you is your religion, and for me is my religion.
entries.count_notes: Recite before sleeping
entries.benefit: It is a declaration of freedom from shirk before sleeping. Protection of Tawhid during the night.

entries.title: Allahumma Rabbas-Samawat Dua Before Sleep
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ رَبَّنَا وَرَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ فَالِقَ الْحَبِّ وَالنَّوَى وَمُنَزِّلَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَالْإِنْجِيلِ وَالْقُرْآنِ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهِ اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الْأَوَّلُ فَلَيْسَ قَبْلَكَ شَيْءٌ وَأَنْتَ الْآخِرُ فَلَيْسَ بَعْدَكَ شَيْءٌ وَأَنْتَ الظَّاهِرُ فَلَيْسَ فَوْقَكَ شَيْءٌ وَأَنْتَ الْبَاطِنُ فَلَيْسَ دُونَكَ شَيْءٌ اقْضِ عَنَّا الدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنَا مِنَ الْفَقْرِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma Rabbas-samaawaatis-sab'i wa Rabbal-'arshil-'azeem, Rabbana wa Rabba kulli shay', faaliqdal-habbi wan-nawaa, wa munazzilat-Tawraati wal-Injeeli wal-Qur'aan, a'oodhu bika min sharri kulli shay'in anta aakhidhum binaasiyatih. Allaahumma antal-Awwalu falaysa qablaka shay'un wa antal-Aakhiru falaysa ba'daka shay'un, wa antadh-Dhaahiru falaysa fawqaka shay'un wa antal-Baatinu falaysa doonaka shay'un. Iqdi 'annad-dayna wa aghnina minal-faqr.
entries.tr: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Magnificent Throne, our Lord and Lord of everything, Splitter of the seed and the date-stone, Revealer of the Torah and the Injeel and the Quran, I seek refuge in You from the evil of everything You shall seize by the forelock. O Allah, You are the First and nothing has come before You; You are the Last and nothing will come after You; You are the Manifest and nothing is above You; You are the Hidden and nothing is beneath You. Pay off our debt for us and free us from poverty.
entries.benefit: Comprehensive night supplication covering divine attributes and seeking relief from debt and poverty

entries.title: Aayat Al-Kursi Before Sleep
entries.ar: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahu laa ilaaha illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom. Laa ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa laa nawm. Lahoo maa fis-samaawaati wa maa fil-ard. Man dhal-ladhee yashfa'u 'indahoo illaa bi-idhnih. Ya'lamu maa bayna aydeehim wa maa khalfahum. Wa laa yuheetoona bi-shay'im-min 'ilmihee illaa bimaa shaa'. Wasi'a Kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal-ard. Wa laa ya'ooduhoo hifzuhumaa wa Huwal-'Aliyyul-'Azeem.
entries.tr: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who could intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
entries.count_notes: Recite once after every obligatory prayer, once in the morning, and before sleeping
entries.benefit: Whoever recites Ayat al-Kursi before sleeping, Allah will appoint a guardian over him and Shaytan will not approach him until morning.

entries.title: Sleeping on Right Side Dua
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ خَلَقْتَ نَفْسِي وَأَنْتَ تَوَفَّاهَا لَكَ مَمَاتُهَا وَمَحْيَاهَا إِنْ أَحْيَيْتَهَا فَاحْفَظْهَا وَإِنْ أَمَتَّهَا فَاغْفِرْ لَهَا اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innaka khalaqta nafsee wa anta tawaffaahaa, laka mamaatuha wa mahyaahaa, in ahyaytahaa fahfadhhaa, wa in amattahaa faghfir lahaa. Allaahumma innee as'alukal-'aafiyah.
entries.tr: O Allah, You created my soul and You will cause it to die; to You belongs its death and its life. If You keep it alive, protect it, and if You cause it to die, forgive it. O Allah, I ask You for safety.
entries.benefit: A profound supplication acknowledging Allah's complete ownership of the soul.

label: Adhkar Upon Waking (أذكار الاستيقاظ)
desc: Remembrances to be recited upon waking from sleep

entries.title: Alhamdulillah Alladhi Ahyana
entries.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
entries.tr_en: Alhamdu lillaahil-ladhee ahyaanaa ba'da maa amaatanaa wa ilayhin-nushoor.
entries.tr: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having caused us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.
entries.benefit: First dhikr upon waking — gratitude for the gift of waking up

entries.title: Wiping Face and Reciting Ayat Al-Imran
entries.ar: إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَاخْتِلَافِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ لَآيَاتٍ لِّأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ الَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ اللَّهَ قِيَامًا وَقُعُودًا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَٰذَا بَاطِلًا سُبْحَانَكَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
entries.tr_en: Inna fee khalqis-samaawaati wal-ardi wakhtilaafillayli wan-nahaari la-aayaatin li'ulil-albaab. Alladheenadh-kuroon Allaaha qiyaamaan wa qu'oodan wa 'alaa junoobihim wa yatafakkaroona fee khalqis-samaawaati wal-ard. Rabbanaa maa khalaqta haadha baatilan subhaanaka faqinaa 'adhaaban-naar.
entries.tr: Indeed, in the creation of the heavens and the earth and in the alternation of night and day there are signs for those of understanding — those who remember Allah while standing, sitting, and lying on their sides, and who reflect on the creation of the heavens and the earth, saying: Our Lord, You have not created this without purpose. Glory be to You! Save us from the punishment of the Fire.
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) would recite these verses upon waking and sitting up, as reported by Ibn Abbas.

label: General Forms of Dhikr (الأذكار العامة)
desc: Remembrances that can be said at any time

entries.title: Tahlil — La Ilaha Illallah
entries.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illAllaah.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah.
entries.benefit: The best form of dhikr. It outweighs the seven heavens and seven earths. Guarantor of Paradise for those who say it sincerely. On the Day of Judgment it will outweigh all sins on the Scale.

entries.title: Tasbih — Subhanallah
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaah.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah.
entries.benefit: Fills the scales of deeds. The Prophet (pbuh) said: 'Saying Subhanallah is sadaqah.' A tree is planted in Paradise for each tasbih.

entries.title: Tahmid — Alhamdulillah
entries.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Alhamdu lillaah.
entries.tr: All praise is to Allah.
entries.benefit: Alhamdulillah fills the scales of deeds. It is the best dua (supplication) — Tirmidhi 3383.

entries.title: Takbir — Allahu Akbar
entries.ar: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahu Akbar.
entries.tr: Allah is the Greatest.
entries.benefit: It fills what is between the heaven and the earth with rewards. Said when beginning acts of worship, during Eid, during difficulty.

entries.title: Hawqalah — La Hawla wa La Quwwata Illah Billah
entries.ar: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaah.
entries.tr: There is no power or might except with Allah.
entries.benefit: It is a treasure from the treasures of Paradise. (Bukhari 4205). It is a medicine for 99 ailments, the least of which is worry. Relieves anxiety and affirms complete dependence upon Allah.

entries.title: Complete Tasbih Set (Subhan Allah, Alhamdulillah, La ilaha illallah, Allahu Akbar)
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanallaahi wal-hamdu lillaahi wa laa ilaaha illAllaahu wallaahu Akbar.
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah, and all praise is to Allah, and none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, and Allah is the Greatest.
entries.benefit: Al-Baqiyat al-Salihaat (the enduring righteous deeds). They are more beloved to the Prophet than all the worldly riches. Each is equivalent to a large tree planted in Paradise.

entries.title: Istighfar — Astaghfirullah
entries.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
entries.tr_en: Astaghfirullaaha wa atoobu ilayh.
entries.tr: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and turn in repentance to Him.
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) would seek forgiveness more than 70 times a day. Istighfar removes anxiety, opens provisions, and causes rain. Whoever makes it their habit, Allah will provide a way out from every distress.

entries.title: Salawat upon the Prophet
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma salli 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa aali Muhammadin kamaa sallayta 'alaa Ibraaheema wa 'alaa aali Ibraaheema innaka Hameedun Majeed. Wa baarik 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa aali Muhammadin kamaa baarakta 'alaa Ibraaheema wa 'alaa aali Ibraaheema innaka Hameedun Majeed.
entries.tr: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and upon the family of Ibrahim. Verily, You are full of praise and majesty. O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent blessings upon Ibrahim and upon the family of Ibrahim. Verily, You are full of praise and majesty.
entries.count: Unlimited — minimum 10 per day especially morning and evening
entries.benefit: For every single salawat upon the Prophet, Allah sends 10 blessings upon you, 10 sins are erased, and you are raised 10 levels. Allah and His angels send prayers upon those who send prayers on the Prophet.

label: Duas from the Quran (أدعية القرآن الكريم)
desc: Supplications directly from the Quran, taught by Allah Himself

entries.title: Dua of Al-Fatiha — Guide Us to the Straight Path
entries.ar: اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ
entries.tr_en: Ihdinas-Siraatal-Mustaqeem.
entries.tr: Guide us to the Straight Path.
entries.benefit: The most beneficial and comprehensive dua. Said at least 17 times per day in prayer.

entries.title: Dua of Ibrahim — Best of This World and Hereafter
entries.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
entries.tr_en: Rabbanaa aatinaa fid-dunyaa hasanatan wa fil-aakhirati hasanatan wa qinaa 'adhaaban-naar.
entries.tr: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
entries.benefit: The most complete dua. Covers all good of this world, all good of the Hereafter, and protection from Hellfire. The Prophet (pbuh) made it most frequently.

entries.title: Dua of Adam and Hawwa — Forgiveness and Mercy
entries.ar: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
entries.tr_en: Rabbanaa zhalamnaaa anfusanaa wa illam taghfir lanaa wa tarhamnaa lanakoonanna minal-khaasireen.
entries.tr: Our Lord! We have wronged ourselves. If You forgive us not, and bestow not upon us Your Mercy, we shall certainly be among the losers.
entries.benefit: The first dua made by mankind. A sincere admission of sin and complete dependence on Allah's forgiveness and mercy.

entries.title: Dua of Yunus (Jonah) — From Darkness
entries.ar: لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illaa anta subhaanaka innee kuntu minadh-dhaalimeen.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except You. Glory be to You. Surely I was among the wrongdoers.
entries.benefit: This is the supplication by which Yunus (as) called upon Allah while in the belly of the whale. No Muslim supplicates with it but that Allah responds to him. (Tirmidhi — Sahih)

entries.title: Dua of Musa — Seeking Help
entries.ar: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
entries.tr_en: Rabbi innee limaa anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqeer.
entries.tr: My Lord, I am in absolute need of whatever good You may send down to me.
entries.benefit: Dua of Musa (as) when he was in dire need after fleeing Egypt. An expression of complete humility and need before Allah. Used when seeking provision, help, or mercy.

entries.title: Dua for Steadfastness — People of Understanding
entries.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْوَهَّابُ
entries.tr_en: Rabbanaa laa tuzigh quloobana ba'da idh hadaytanaa wa hab lanaa mil ladunka rahmah. Innaka antal-Wahhaab.
entries.tr: Our Lord, let not our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us from Yourself mercy. Indeed, You are the Bestower.
entries.benefit: Protection against deviation from the Truth. Should be said constantly to maintain steadfastness on the right path.

entries.title: Dua of Zakariyya for Offspring
entries.ar: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِن لَّدُنكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً ۖ إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
entries.tr_en: Rabbi hab lee mil-ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibah, innaka samee'ud-du'aa'.
entries.tr: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.
entries.benefit: Dua of Prophet Zakariyya (as) when he was old and without children. Recommended for those seeking children and righteous offspring.

entries.title: Dua of People of the Cave — Mercy and Guidance
entries.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
entries.tr_en: Rabbanaa aatinaa mil-ladunka rahmatan wa hayyi' lanaa min amrinaa rashadaa.
entries.tr: Our Lord, grant us mercy from Yourself and facilitate for us our affair in the right way.
entries.benefit: Dua of the People of the Cave (Ashab al-Kahf) as they sought refuge. Recommended in times of fitna and when seeking guidance.

entries.title: Dua for Beneficial Knowledge
entries.ar: رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
entries.tr_en: Rabbi zidnee 'ilmaa.
entries.tr: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
entries.benefit: The only instance in the Quran where Allah commands the Prophet to ask for more of something — and it is knowledge. Short, powerful, to be said often especially when studying.

entries.title: Dua for Mercy on Parents
entries.ar: رَّبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
entries.tr_en: Rabbir-hamhumaa kamaa rabbayaanee sagheeraa.
entries.tr: My Lord, have mercy upon them both as they raised me when I was young.
entries.benefit: Commanded by Allah to make for one's parents. Among the most beloved duas to make for parents — living or deceased.

entries.title: Tawbah of People of Baqarah — Final Verses
entries.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ ۖ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
entries.tr_en: Rabbanaa laa tu'aakhidhnaa in-naseenaa aw akhta'naa. Rabbanaa wa laa tahmil 'alaynaa isran kamaa hamaltahoo 'alal-ladheena min qablinaa. Rabbanaa wa laa tuhammilnaa maa laa taaqata lanaa bih. Wa'fu 'annaa, waghfir lanaa, warhamnaa. Anta mawlaanaa fansurnaa 'alal-qawmil-kaafireen.
entries.tr: Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we forget or make an error. Our Lord, lay not upon us a burden like that which You laid upon those before us. Our Lord, burden us not with that which we have no ability to bear. And pardon us, and forgive us, and have mercy upon us. You are our protector, so give us victory over the disbelieving people.
entries.benefit: Allah answered these duas with 'I have done it' for each phrase. Part of the last two ayat of Al-Baqarah which are a treasure from beneath the Throne.

entries.title: Dua of Ibrahim for Tawhid and Offspring
entries.ar: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِي ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ ﴿٤٠﴾ رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
entries.tr_en: Rabbij-'alnee muqeemas-salaati wa min dhurriyyatee. Rabbanaa wa taqabbal du'aa'. Rabbanagh-fir lee wa liwaalidayya wa lil-mu'mineena yawma yaqoomul-hisaab.
entries.tr: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication. Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers the Day the account is established.
entries.benefit: Dua of Ibrahim (as) combining salah, offspring, acceptance of dua, and forgiveness on the Day of Judgment

label: Adhkar for Daily Actions (أذكار الأعمال اليومية)
desc: Supplications for various daily activities and situations

entries.title: Entering the Home
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahi walajna wa bismillaahi kharajnaa wa 'alAllaahi rabbinaa tawakkalnaa.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we depend.
entries.benefit: Shaytan cannot enter the home of one who says Bismillah upon entering.

entries.title: Leaving the Home
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahi tawakkaltu 'alAllaahi wa laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaah.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
entries.benefit: Whoever says this upon leaving will be told: 'You have been guided, protected and sufficed.' Shaytan then withdraws from him.

entries.title: Entering the Masjid
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahummaf-tah lee abwaaba rahmatik.
entries.tr: O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.
entries.benefit: Protection and access to Allah's mercy upon entering the masjid

entries.title: Leaving the Masjid
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee as'aluka min fadlik.
entries.tr: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty.
entries.benefit: Seeking Allah's provision and blessings when leaving the house of Allah

entries.title: Before Eating
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaah.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah.
entries.benefit: Shaytan cannot eat from the food of the person who says Bismillah. If forgotten at the beginning: 'Bismillaahi awwalaahu wa aakhirah' (In the name of Allah at its beginning and at its end).

entries.title: After Eating
entries.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
entries.tr_en: Alhamdu lillaahil-ladhee at'amanee haadha wa razaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wa laa quwwah.
entries.tr: All praise is to Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power on my part.
entries.benefit: Whoever says this after eating will have his past sins forgiven. (Tirmidhi 3458)

entries.title: Entering the Bathroom
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaah. Allaahumma innee a'oodhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khabaa'ith.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the male and female evil spirits.
entries.benefit: Protection from jinns and evil while in the bathroom. Said before entering.

entries.title: After Leaving the Bathroom
entries.ar: غُفْرَانَكَ
entries.tr_en: Ghufraanak.
entries.tr: I seek Your forgiveness.
entries.benefit: Seeking forgiveness after eliminating hardship — a reminder that Allah is the Remover of all hardship

entries.title: Before Wudu
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaah.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah.
entries.benefit: There is no wudu for the one who does not say Bismillah. It ensures the purification is counted as worship.

entries.title: After Wudu — Shahadah
entries.ar: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
entries.tr_en: Ash-hadu allaa ilaaha illAllaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lah, wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasooluh. Allaahumma-j'alnee minat-tawwaabeena waj-'alnee minal-mutatahhireen.
entries.tr: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger. O Allah, make me of those who repent and make me of those who purify themselves.
entries.benefit: The eight gates of Paradise are opened for whoever says this after wudu, and he can enter through any of them he wishes. (Muslim 234)

entries.title: Dua for Wearing Clothes
entries.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
entries.tr_en: Alhamdu lillaahil-ladhee kasaanee haadha wa razaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wa laa quwwah.
entries.tr: All praise is to Allah who clothed me with this garment and provided it for me without any might or power on my part.
entries.benefit: His past and future sins are forgiven. (Tirmidhi)

entries.title: Dua for Travelling
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى اللَّهُمَّ هَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا هَذَا وَاطْوِ عَنَّا بُعْدَهُ اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الصَّاحِبُ فِي السَّفَرِ وَالْخَلِيفَةُ فِي الْأَهْلِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَعْثَاءِ السَّفَرِ وَكَآبَةِ الْمَنْظَرِ وَسُوءِ الْمُنقَلَبِ فِي الْمَالِ وَالْأَهْلِ وَالْوَلَدِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanal-ladhee sakhkhara lanaa haadha wa maa kunnaa lahoo muqrineen. Wa innaa ilaa Rabbinaa lamunqaliboon. Allaahumma innaa nas'aluka fee safarinaa haadhal-birra wat-taqwaa wa minal-'amali maa tardaa. Allaahumma hawwin 'alaynaa safaranaa haadha watwi 'annaa bu'dah. Allaahumma antas-saahibu fis-safari wal-khaleefatu fil-ahl. Allaahumma innee a'oodhu bika min wa'thaa'is-safari wa ka'aabatil-manzari wa soo'il-munqalabi fil-maali wal-ahli wal-walad.
entries.tr: Glory is to Him Who has provided this for us though we could never have had it by our efforts. Surely, to our Lord we are returning. O Allah, we ask You on this our journey for goodness and piety, and for works that are pleasing to You. O Allah, make easy this journey and let its distance become less. O Allah, You are our companion on the road and the One in Whose care we leave our family. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from this journey's hardships, and from the wicked sights in store and from finding our wealth and family in misfortune on returning.
entries.benefit: The Prophet's complete travel dua; covers safety, righteousness, ease, and protection of family

entries.title: Dua Upon Sneezing
entries.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
entries.tr_en: Alhamdu lillaah.
entries.tr: All praise is to Allah.
entries.benefit: Required etiquette for sneezing — expressing gratitude and invoking mercy

entries.title: Dua Upon Hearing Thunder
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
entries.tr_en: Subhaanal-ladhee yusabbihur-ra'du bihamdihee wal-malaa'ikatu min kheefatih.
entries.tr: Glory is to Him Whom thunder and the angels glorify due to fear of Him.
entries.benefit: Remembering Allah during natural phenomena and affirming His greatness

entries.title: Dua When Looking in the Mirror
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma anta hassanta khalqee fahhassin khuluqee.
entries.tr: O Allah, just as You have made my external features beautiful, make my character beautiful as well.
entries.benefit: Seeking good character along with good appearance; a beautiful dua for inner beauty

entries.title: Dua at the Time of Rain
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبَاً نَافِعَاً
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma sayyiban naafi'aa.
entries.tr: O Allah, may it be a beneficial rain.
entries.benefit: Said when it rains — an accepted time for dua

entries.title: Dua for New Moon Sighting
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْيُمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ وَالسَّلَامَةِ وَالْإِسْلَامِ رَبِّي وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma ahillahu 'alaynaa bil-yumni wal-eemaani was-salaamati wal-islaam. Rabbee wa rabbukAllaah.
entries.tr: O Allah, let this moon appear on us with security and faith, with peace and in Islam. My Lord and your Lord is Allah.
entries.benefit: Recommended upon sighting the new moon each Islamic month

entries.title: Dua for Istikhara — Seeking Guidance in Decision
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِي الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee astakheeruka bi'ilmika wa astaqdiruka biqudratika wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'azeem, fa-innaka taqdiru wa laa aqdiru wa ta'lamu wa laa a'lamu wa anta 'allaamul-ghuyoob. Allaahumma in kunta ta'lamu anna haadhal-amra khayrun lee fee deenee wa ma'aashee wa 'aaqibati amree faqdirhoo lee wa yassirhu lee thumma baarik lee feeh. Wa in kunta ta'lamu anna haadhal-amra sharrun lee fee deenee wa ma'aashee wa 'aaqibati amree fasrifhu 'annee was-rifnee 'anhu waqdir liyal-khayra haythu kaana thumma ardhinee bih.
entries.tr: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by virtue of Your knowledge, and I seek ability by virtue of Your power, and I ask You of Your great bounty. You have power; I have none. And You know; I know not. You are the Knower of hidden things. O Allah, if in Your knowledge this matter is good for me in my religion, my livelihood, and my affairs in the Hereafter (or: in this world and the next), then ordain it for me, make it easy for me, and bless it for me. And if in Your knowledge this matter is bad for me in my religion, my livelihood and my affairs in the Hereafter (or: in this world and the next), then turn it away from me and me from it, and ordain for me the good wherever it may be and make me pleased with it.
entries.count_notes: After 2 rak'ahs of non-obligatory prayer, before deciding
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) taught this to his companions as he taught them surahs of the Quran. The greatest means of seeking guidance when facing a decision.

label: Duas for Distress & Anxiety (أدعية الكرب والهم)
desc: Supplications for times of difficulty, worry, grief, and hardship

entries.title: Dua of Yunus for All Distress
entries.ar: لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illaa anta subhaanaka innee kuntu minadh-dhaalimeen.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except You. Glory be to You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.
entries.benefit: No Muslim supplicates with these words but Allah responds. The gateway dua for any crisis.

entries.title: Dua for Severe Distress (Karbah)
entries.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
entries.tr_en: Laa ilaaha illAllaahul-'Azheemul-Haleem. Laa ilaaha illAllaahu Rabbul-'arshil-'Azeem. Laa ilaaha illAllaahu Rabbus-samaawaati wa Rabbul-ardi wa Rabbul-'arshil-kareem.
entries.tr: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, the Mighty, the Forbearing. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the Mighty Throne. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the heavens and the earth, and Lord of the Noble Throne.
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) said this when something distressed him. Three powerful declarations of Tawhid combining Allah's names and attributes.

entries.title: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa Huwa
entries.ar: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
entries.tr_en: Hasbiyallaahu laa ilaaha illaa Huwa 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa Huwa Rabbul-'arshil-'azeem.
entries.tr: Allah is sufficient for me. None has the right to be worshipped except Him. In Him I have placed my trust and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne.
entries.count_notes: Seven times morning and evening — or upon any anxiety
entries.benefit: Allah will suffice whoever says this seven times in the morning and evening for his worries of this world and the hereafter, whether sincere or not. (Ibn As-Sunni)

entries.title: Innalillahi wa Inna Ilayhi Raji'un
entries.ar: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَاخْلُفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
entries.tr_en: Innaa lillaahi wa innaa ilayhi raaji'oon. Allaahumma'jurnee fee museebatee wakhluf lee khayran minhaa.
entries.tr: Verily, we belong to Allah, and verily, to Him we will return. O Allah, reward me for my affliction and replace it for me with something better.
entries.benefit: Umm Salamah (ra) was taught this by the Prophet (pbuh). When her husband Abu Salamah died, she said this and Allah replaced him with the Prophet himself as her husband. Said upon any loss or calamity.

entries.title: Dua for Worry and Sadness
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ وَابْنُ عَبْدِكَ وَابْنُ أَمَتِكَ نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَدًا مِنْ خَلْقِكَ أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ الْقُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي وَنُورَ صَدْرِي وَجَلَاءَ حُزْنِي وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma innee 'abduka wabnu 'abdika wabnu amatika, naasiyatee biyadika, maadin fiyya hukmuka, 'adlun fiyya qadaa'uka. As'aluka bikulli ismin huwa laka sammayta bihi nafsaka aw 'allamtahu ahadan min khalqika aw anzaltahu fee kitaabika aw-ista'tharta bihi fee 'ilmil-ghaybi 'indaka an taj'alal-Qur'aana rabee'a qalbee wa noora sadree wa jalaa'a huznee wa dhahaaba hammee.
entries.tr: O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your maidservant. My forelock is in Your hand. Your judgment upon me is certain. Your decree concerning me is just. I ask You by every name that You have — that You named Yourself with, or revealed in Your Book, or taught to any of Your creation, or kept in the knowledge of the unseen with You — to make the Quran the spring of my heart, the light of my chest, the departure of my sadness and the release of my anxiety.
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) said: No servant is afflicted with anxiety or grief and then says this, but Allah will remove his anxiety and grief and replace it with joy.

label: Adhkar for Protection & Ruqyah (أذكار الحماية والرقية)
desc: Adhkar for protection from evil eye, magic, jinn, and all harm

entries.title: Ayat al-Kursi for Protection
entries.ar: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahu laa ilaaha illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom. Laa ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa laa nawm. Lahoo maa fis-samaawaati wa maa fil-ard. Man dhal-ladhee yashfa'u 'indahoo illaa bi-idhnih. Ya'lamu maa bayna aydeehim wa maa khalfahum. Wa laa yuheetoona bi-shay'im-min 'ilmihee illaa bimaa shaa'. Wasi'a Kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal-ard. Wa laa ya'ooduhoo hifzuhumaa wa Huwal-'Aliyyul-'Azeem.
entries.tr: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who could intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
entries.count_notes: Recite once after every obligatory prayer, once in the morning, and before sleeping
entries.benefit: Ayat al-Kursi is the greatest verse of protection. Recite morning, evening, after every salah, before sleeping.

entries.title: The Three Quls for Complete Protection
entries.ar: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۞ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۞ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۞ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ ❖ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۞ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ۞ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ۞ وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ۞ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ ❖ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۞ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۞ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ۞ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۞ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ۞ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
entries.tr_en: Qul Huwallaahu Ahad. Allaahus-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yoolad. Wa lam yakul-lahoo kufuwan ahad. ❖ Qul a'oodhu biRabbil-falaq. Min sharri maa khalaq. Wa min sharri ghaasiqin idhaa waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffaathaati fil-'uqad. Wa min sharri haasidin idhaa hasad. ❖ Qul a'oodhu biRabbin-naas. Malikin-naas. Ilaahin-naas. Min sharril-waswaasil-khannaas. Alladhee yuwaswisu fee sudoorin-naas. Minal-jinnati wan-naas.
entries.tr: Surah Al-Ikhlas: Say — He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born, nor is there to Him any equivalent. ❖ Surah Al-Falaq: Say — I seek refuge in the Lord of Daybreak from the evil of what He created, from the evil of darkness when it settles, from the evil of blowers in knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies. ❖ Surah An-Nas: Say — I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the whisperer who withdraws, who whispers evil into the breasts of mankind, from among jinn and mankind.
entries.count_notes: Three times each morning and evening; once after each prayer
entries.benefit: Recite three times each in morning and evening for complete daily protection.

entries.title: The Two Verses of Surah Al-Baqarah for Evening Protection
entries.ar: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِن رَّبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۚ كُلٌّ آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَمَلَائِكَتِهِ وَكُتُبِهِ وَرُسُلِهِ لَا نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍ مِّن رُّسُلِهِ ۚ وَقَالُوا سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا ۖ غُفْرَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ ﴿٢٨٥﴾ لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا اكْتَسَبَتْ ۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ ۖ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ ﴿٢٨٦﴾
entries.tr_en: Aamanar-Rasoolu bimaa unzila ilayhi mir-Rabbihee wal-mu'minoon. Kullun aamana billaahi wa malaa'ikatihee wa kutubihee wa rusulih. Laa nufarriqu bayna ahadim-mir-rusulih. Wa qaaloo sami'naa wa ata'naa ghufraanaka Rabbanaa wa ilaykal-maseer. Laa yukallifullaahu nafsan illaa wus'ahaa. Lahaa maa kasabat wa 'alayhaa mak-tasabat. Rabbanaa laa tu'aakhidhnaa in-naseenaa aw akhta'naa. Rabbanaa wa laa tahmil 'alaynaa isran kamaa hamaltahoo 'alalladheena min qablinaa. Rabbanaa wa laa tuhammilnaa maa laa taaqata lanaa bih. Wa'fu 'annaa, waghfir lanaa, warhamnaa. Anta mawlaanaa fansurnaa 'alal-qawmil-kaafireen.
entries.tr: The Messenger believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord, and so did the believers. All believed in Allah and His angels and His books and His messengers, saying 'We hear and we obey. Grant us Your forgiveness, our Lord.' Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear. Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we forget or make an error. Our Lord, lay not upon us a burden like those before us. Our Lord, burden us not with what we cannot bear. Pardon us, forgive us, and have mercy upon us. You are our protector, so give us victory over the disbelieving people.
entries.count_notes: Recite once — especially before sleeping
entries.benefit: Reciting the last two verses of Al-Baqarah at night will suffice as protection. A shield against Shaytan for three nights.

entries.title: A'udhu Bikalimatillah al-Tammati
entries.ar: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
entries.tr_en: A'oodhu bikalimaatil-laahit-taammaati min sharri maa khalaq.
entries.tr: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
entries.count_notes: Three times in the evening
entries.benefit: Whoever says this three times in the evening — no poison or snake will harm him that night.

entries.title: Ruqyah on Body — The Three Quls
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَرْقِيكَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ يُؤْذِيكَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ أَوْ عَيْنِ حَاسِدٍ اللَّهُ يَشْفِيكَ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَرْقِيكَ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahi arqeeka min kulli shay'in yu'dheeka, min sharri kulli nafsin aw 'ayni haasidin, Allaahu yashfeeka, bismillaahi arqeeka.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah I perform ruqyah on you from everything that harms you, from the evil of every soul or envious eye. May Allah cure you; in the name of Allah I perform ruqyah on you.
entries.benefit: Ruqyah recited by Jibreel for the Prophet (pbuh). Recite while passing hand over the affected area.

label: Duas During Illness & for Healing (أدعية المريض والشفاء)

entries.title: Dua for Healing the Sick
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَاسَ اشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمَاً
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma Rabban-naasi adhhibil-ba's, ishfihee wa antash-shaafee, laa shifaa'a illaa shifaa'uka, shifaa'an laa yughaadiru saqamaa.
entries.tr: O Allah, Lord of mankind, do away with my suffering. Heal me for You are the Healer. There is no cure but through You; a cure that leaves no illness behind.
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) used to recite this while visiting the sick, passing his right hand over the body.

entries.title: Self-Ruqyah Before Sleeping
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ يُبْرِئُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ يُؤْذِيكَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ أَوْ عَيْنٍ حَاسِدٍ اللَّهُ يَشْفِيكَ
entries.tr_en: Bismillaahi yubri'uka min kulli shay'in yu'dheeka min sharri kulli nafsin aw 'ayni haasidin, Allaahu yashfeeka.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah, may He cure you of everything that harms you, from the evil of every soul or envious eye. Allah will cure you.

entries.title: Dua When Feeling Pain
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ (×٣) أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ (×٧)
entries.tr_en: Bismillaah (×3). A'oodhu bi'izzatillaahi wa qudratihee min sharri maa ajidu wa uhadhir (×7).
entries.tr: In the name of Allah (×3). I seek refuge in Allah's might and power from the evil of what I find and what I guard against (×7).
entries.benefit: Place your hand on the area of pain and recite this. The Prophet (pbuh) prescribed this and it was reported to relieve pain effectively.

entries.title: Dua Upon Visiting the Graveyard
entries.ar: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الدِّيَارِ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ وَإِنَّا إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ بِكُمْ لَاحِقُونَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ لَنَا وَلَكُمُ الْعَافِيَةَ
entries.tr_en: As-salaamu 'alaykum ahlad-diyaari minal-mu'mineena wal-muslimeen, wa innaa in shaa'allaahu bikum laahiqoon, nas'alullaaha lanaa wa lakumul-'aafiyah.
entries.tr: Peace be upon you, O inhabitants of the graves, among the believers and the Muslims. Verily, we will (Allah willing) join you. We ask Allah for well-being for us and for you.

entries.title: Dua at the Time of Adhan
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma Rabba haadhihid-da'watit-taammati was-salaatil-qaa'imati, aati Muhammadan al-waseelata wal-fadeelata wab'ath-hu maqaaman mahmooda nilladhee wa'adtah.
