entries.tr: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and of the prayer to be offered, grant Muhammad the privilege and also the eminence, and resurrect him to the praised position that You have promised him.
entries.benefit: Whoever says this after hearing the adhan, my intercession will be permitted for him on the Day of Resurrection. (Bukhari 614)

entries.title: Dua for Beginning of Marriage (Consummation)
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ جَنِّبْنَا الشَّيْطَانَ وَجَنِّبِ الشَّيْطَانَ مَا رَزَقْتَنَا
entries.tr_en: Bismillaah. Allaahumma jannibnash-shaytaana wa jannibish-shaytaana maa razaqtanaa.
entries.tr: In the name of Allah. O Allah, keep Shaytan away from us and keep Shaytan away from what You grant us.
entries.benefit: If Allah decrees a child from this union, Shaytan will never harm that child.

entries.title: Dua for a Newborn
entries.ar: أُعِيذُكَ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
entries.tr_en: U'eedhuka bikalimaatil-laahit-taammati min kulli shaytaanin wa haammatin wa min kulli 'aynin laammah.
entries.tr: I seek refuge for you in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and every poisonous pest and from every evil eye.
entries.benefit: The Prophet (pbuh) sought refuge for Hasan and Husayn with these words. Blow on the newborn after reciting.

label: Duas for Rizq & Provision (أدعية الرزق والبركة)

entries.title: Dua for Rizq — Musa's Dua
entries.ar: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
entries.tr_en: Rabbi innee limaa anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqeer.
entries.tr: My Lord, I am indeed in need of whatever good You may send down to me.

entries.title: Istighfar for Rizq
entries.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
entries.tr_en: Astaghfirullaahil-ladhee laa ilaaha illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoomu wa atoobu ilayh.
entries.tr: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, beside Whom there is no deity, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all existence, and I turn to Him in repentance.
entries.benefit: Whoever makes istighfar his constant practice, Allah will provide a way out for him from every difficulty, relief from every sorrow, and will provide for him from where he does not expect.

entries.title: Dua for Barakah in What We Have
entries.ar: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيمَا رَزَقْتَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
entries.tr_en: Allaahumma baarik lanaa feemaa razaqtanaa wa qinaa 'adhaaban-naar.
entries.tr: O Allah, bless what You have provided us, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

label: Types and Virtues of Dhikr (أنواع الذكر وفضائله)
desc: Classification of dhikr and their spiritual virtues — reference section

entries.title: Types of Dhikr
entries.ar:
الأذكار العامة: ما يُقال في أي وقت — لا إله إلا الله، سبحان الله، الحمد لله، الله أكبر، لا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله، أستغفر الله، الصلاة على النبي ﷺ

الأذكار الخاصة: ما يُقال في أوقات أو أعمال محددة بصيغة وعدد معينين — كأذكار الصباح والمساء وأذكار ما بعد الصلاة وأذكار النوم
entries.tr:
General Dhikr (said at any time): La ilaha illallah, SubhanAllah, Alhamdulillah, Allahu Akbar, La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah, Astaghfirullah, Salawat on the Prophet ﷺ.

Specific Adhkar (said at prescribed times/occasions with set wording & count): Morning & Evening adhkar, After-prayer adhkar, Sleep adhkar.

entries.title: Three Levels of Dhikr
entries.ar:
١. ذكر اللسان فقط — أدنى المراتب ولكنه مأجور
٢. ذكر القلب فقط — التفكر في الله دون نطق
٣. ذكر اللسان والقلب معاً — أعلى المراتب وأعظم أجراً
entries.tr:
1. Dhikr of the tongue only — the lowest level, but still rewarded.
2. Dhikr of the heart only — reflecting on Allah without verbal expression.
3. Dhikr of both tongue and heart together — the highest and most rewarding level.

entries.title: Benefits of Dhikr — Summary from Sources
entries.ar:
• Dhikr is greater than everything else in creation (Quran 29:45)
• Leads to success (Quran 62:10)
• Allah remembers the one who remembers Him (Quran 2:152)
• Best of all deeds — better than spending gold and silver (Tirmidhi)
• Protection from Shaytan (like a fortress)
• Source of contentment and inner peace (Quran 13:28)
• Forgiveness of sins
• Opens the doors of provision (rizq)
• Brings life to the heart
• Noor (light) in this world and the Hereafter
• Angels surround the gatherings of dhikr
• Allah boasts of dhikr-doers to the angels
• Means of acceptance of dua
• Protection from anxiety, grief, and depression
• Raises ranks in Paradise
• The only worship that continues in Paradise

label: Adhkar for Children (أذكار للأطفال)
desc: Simple, essential adhkar suitable for teaching children

entries.title: Bismillah before everything
entries.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
entries.tr: In the name of Allah

entries.title: Alhamdulillah for everything
entries.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
entries.tr: All praise is to Allah

entries.title: Subhanallah in wonder
entries.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
entries.tr: Glory is to Allah

entries.title: Allahu Akbar in difficulty
entries.ar: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
entries.tr: Allah is the Greatest

entries.title: Inshallah for future plans
entries.ar: إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
entries.tr: If Allah wills

entries.title: Astaghfirullah for mistakes
entries.ar: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
entries.tr: I seek the forgiveness of Allah

entries.title: La ilaha illallah — core of faith
entries.ar: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
entries.tr: There is no god except Allah
